The event underscored the growing recognition of streaming creators in prestigious international forums.

Improved sale realisations, robust project completions, and debt reduction strengthened the developer’s financial position despite accounting-related revenue recognition timing differences.

business.title: India gets its UPI for EV charging as Kumaraswamy unveils unified Bharat e-charge

business.summary: This is the second consecutive month that domestic tractor sales have crossed the one lakh mark

business.title: Dixon Tech Q4 profit falls 36% despite revenue growth and expansion plans
business.summary: Dixon Technologies reported a sharp decline in quarterly profit due to weak consumer demand, rising component costs, and the end of PLI benefits. Despite margin pressure, the company expects strong FY27 growth driven by smartphone manufacturing, telecom equipment, exports, and IT hardware expansion.

business.title: Plan for PMIS: Final year diploma students to be eligible Cos can go to campus to pick up interns

business.title: Nexus Select Trust Q4 net operating income up 11% at Rs 440 crore
business.summary: Nexus Select Trust reported strong quarterly growth driven by rising tenant sales, stable occupancy, and higher retail income across key consumption categories. The retail REIT expanded its portfolio through acquisitions and development deals while maintaining healthy payouts and guiding continued distribution growth for FY27.

entertainment.title: Not Tamannaah Bhatia but Nargis Fakhri to romance Aayush Sharma in Ragini 3
entertainment.summary: HT City has exclusively learnt that Nargis Fakhri has been cast opposite Aayush Sharma in Ektaa Kapoor's upcoming film Ragini 3

entertainment.title: Rajinikanth smiles, refuses to comment when asked about Vijay becoming CM of Tamil Nadu. Watch
entertainment.summary: Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK) chief and actor Vijay took oath as Tamil Nadu Chief Minister a few days ago, after scoring a majority to form a government.

entertainment.title: Fans accuse L'Oreal of snubbing Aishwarya Rai Bachchan after brand unveils only Alia Bhatt's giant poster at Cannes
entertainment.summary: Aishwarya Rai Bachchan fans are disappointed as L'Oreal Paris ignored her in a promotional video for Cannes 2026, featuring Alia Bhatt instead.

entertainment.title: ‘Made that mistake with Ek Din’: Junaid Khan reveals why he no longer shows scripts to dad Aamir Khan
entertainment.summary: Junaid Khan explained why he doesn't discuss scripts with his father, Aamir Khan, highlighting the challenges of collaboration.

entertainment.title: Kamal Haasan, Vishal support CM Vijay's order to close 717 liquor shops near schools, temples in Tamil Nadu: ‘Hats off’
entertainment.summary: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Vijay has ordered the closure of 717 state-run retail liquor outlets, including 276 shops near places of worship.
